final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire enable,
    output reg out
);
    initial begin
        out = 0; // Initial state
    end
    
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (enable) begin
            out <= ~out; // Toggle output
        end
    end
endmodule
